TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Vince_Boryla, title = Vince_Boryla, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Vince_Boryla} }

S.FORM: Vince Boryla sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1927 , ryax sa tay 11 nqu tay 3, Vince Boryla, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2016) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Vince Boryla sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1927 , ryax sa tay 11 nqu tay 3, Vince Boryla, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2016) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *inʦ~ʨe βorjla s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa. kawas~ɕ taj **** , rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, *inʦ~ʨe βorjla, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. (mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
